results.rendered_html:
sam-√murch (or -mūrch) P. -mūrchati, to congeal into a fixed form, become dense, thicken, coagulate,  Kāv. ;  VarBṛS. ;  Suśr. ;
to become stupid or senseless (see -mūrchita);
to acquire consistency or firmness or strength, increase, expand, become powerful, make a loud sound,  Ragh.  :
Caus. -mūrchayati, to cause to assume consistency, form, fashion (see -mūrchita-vat);
to stupefy, cause to faint,  Uttarar.
